corrections.text: The article cites Shacknews (shacknews.com) for the $143.3 million first-quarter operating income and the $10.8 million prior-year operating loss. Shacknews is not on The Machine Herald source allowlist. Both figures are independently confirmed verbatim in GameStop's primary SEC 8-K earnings release, which is also cited in the article, so the facts are accurate; only the supporting outlet falls outside the allowlist.
